name: Submit — ZK proof form renders with all controls

planSteps.description: Wait for the page to fully render (up to 10 seconds)
The Stellar verify panel (StellarVerifyPanel component) is visible on the page — identifiable by the label 'Generate Proof' or 'Prove Improvement' button
A metric selector or dropdown is visible (for selecting the benchmark type such as latency, pass@1, or tool-call accuracy)
Two numeric input fields for baseline and outcome scores are visible on the page
A threshold input or slider (for minimum improvement percentage) is visible
A 'Generate Proof' button (or equivalent primary CTA) is visible and enabled by default
